subject: ME
body:
JEE  -      I know   I just wrote  to you first to thank you for wishing me a 
HAPPY BIRTHDAY  -  right ?
Or I should have reminded SARAH   !!!!!      You would have or You STILL WILL 
 !!!!!!!   The day is not over  .
Hope yooooou are well.     I'm happy I'm just OK.  
Love and a Hug or two ,
Marcia Mae



**************Vote for your city's best dining and nightlife. City's Best 
2008.      (http://citysbest.aol.com?ncid=aolacg00050000000102)
